project.title: Style Group Demo
project.description: Minimal brief demonstrating style_group img2img: anchor, follower, opt-out, and video-first reference.
project.art_direction: flat 2D colored sprites, warm palette, consistent line weight
project.gameplay_loop: Move through a short level with two companion characters.
project.session_goal: Demo: style_group cast with img2img followers and one walk clip.

assets.name: hero_a
assets.usage_description: Style group anchor — first cast member, no style_anchor
assets.description: lead hero, standing pose, facing right

assets.name: hero_b
assets.usage_description: Follower in cast_demo — default style img2img from hero_a
assets.description: companion character, same art style as hero_a

assets.name: hero_b_alt
assets.usage_description: Follower with identity_anchor — img2img from hero_a identity, not style anchor
assets.description: same character variant, identity locked to hero_a

assets.name: hero_c
assets.usage_description: Follower with use_style_img2img false — pure text-to-image
assets.description: third cast member, style group declared but img2img disabled

assets.name: hero_a_walk
assets.usage_description: Walk cycle — video still uses reference_asset, not style_anchor
assets.action: walking to the right, smooth walk cycle
